rationale: The ensures is an implication `P ==> det_equal`, so P is NOT a free hypothesis in the body — that is why the prior attempt's bare `assert(forall|i| ...)` failed (the forall is one of P's conjuncts, not a known fact). Wrap the entire proof in `if P { ... }`, which introduces P as a hypothesis inside the branch and makes the implication vacuously true outside. Inside, prove pointwise page_array equality by case-splitting on `i == index` (8 field equalities at the modified index, transitivity through pre off-index), lift to view equality via `=~=`, and the remaining field-view equalities of `det_equal` follow from struct equality through pre.
